diagrams.title: DDoS Attack Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows how a botnet is used to launch a coordinated DDoS attack against a target
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the distributed nature of DDoS attacks and how attackers coordinate multiple systems

diagrams.title: SYN Flood Attack Mechanism
diagrams.description: Illustrates the TCP three-way handshake exploitation in SYN flood attacks
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how half-open connections are created and how they exhaust server resources

diagrams.title: Amplification Attack Process
diagrams.description: Shows how small requests generate large amplified responses directed at victim
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how attackers magnify their attack traffic using vulnerable servers

diagrams.title: DDoS Attack Classification
diagrams.description: Three-tier classification of DDoS attacks: Volumetric, Protocol, and Application Layer
elements: Protocol (SYN Flood, Ping of Death, Smurf)
diagrams.purpose: Memorizing different types of DDoS attacks and their characteristics
